batch_summary.note: Post-Valentine hostile period: EP-0230 Feb 22 2023 (45 msgs, FLOOD) + EP-0273 Mar 30 2023 (62 msgs, FLOOD). Two hostile episodes in the 5 weeks following the Valentine's mega-cluster. Combined 107 hostile msgs. ADD-001 trigger-unpredictability: EP-0230 occurs 8 days after the EP-0219 mega-cluster, suggesting hostility is not correlated with a specific recurring trigger but persists as a sustained pattern.

primary_flags.escalation_shape: sustained Phase A hostile period — two episodes in 5 weeks post-mega-cluster

delta_profile.sent_direction: measured responses; Eli not re-initiating between episodes
delta_profile.received_direction: hostile initiation 8 days after mega-cluster (EP-0230) and again 5 weeks later (EP-0273)
delta_profile.de_escalation_resistance: Eli disengages after each episode; Melissa re-initiates at Feb 22 and Mar 30

primary_flags.cycle_classification: CYC-002 content-correlated (logistics/scheduling likely precursors per triage topic data); post-holiday period re-escalation cycle
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: B-006 contains RF-04 primary flags (2 flags, Sev-1/Sev-2). RF-04 DARVO episodes co-located with hostile episode periods.

arc_updates.event: Post-mega-cluster hostile period persists for 5 weeks (Feb 22 - Mar 30). Trajectory pattern: hostile episodes are not isolated spikes but sustained across weeks.
Eli disengages; Melissa re-initiates 8 days later (EP-0230) and again 5 weeks later (EP-0273). Between-episode resistance pattern: 5th and 6th documented instances.
